parts.text: Please run a financial audit on financials.txt and resale_cert.txt. Check for any pending special assessments, monthly dues, and if the reserves are underfunded.

Based on the audit, there is a pending special assessment of $5,000.00 per unit for roofing repairs noted in financials.txt and resale_cert.txt. The reserves are currently only 30% funded (balance of $120,000 against a recommended $400,000, underfunded by $280,000). The monthly maintenance fee is $450.00.
Audit ccrs.txt and bylaws.txt to check for any rental lease caps and pet restrictions.

According to CC&Rs Section 7.1 and resale_cert.txt, there is a rental leasing cap of 15% of all units, with current occupancy at 14.8%. Pet restrictions in CC&Rs Section 8.5 and Article VI Section 2 of the Bylaws limit homeowners to two domestic pets with an individual weight limit of 35 lbs.
